name: Cloudflare Workers AI
description: Registers Cloudflare Workers AI as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with account-scoped model discovery and embeddings.

env.description: Fallback Cloudflare account ID used to build the account-scoped Workers AI OpenAI-compatible base URL when no account_id Plugin Setting is configured.
Fallback Cloudflare API token used for Workers AI model discovery, inference, and embeddings when no api_token Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Cloudflare account ID
settings.description: Cloudflare account ID used to build the account-scoped Workers AI OpenAI-compatible base URL. Falls back to CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.

settings.label: Cloudflare API token
settings.description: Cloudflare API token used for model discovery, inference, and embeddings. Falls back to CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.

providers.name: Cloudflare Workers AI
providers.description: Refreshes Cloudflare Workers AI text-generation models from the account-scoped model search API and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.

providers.name: Cloudflare Workers AI Embeddings
providers.description: Refreshes Cloudflare Workers AI text-embedding models and provides embedding vectors through the OpenAI-compatible embeddings endpoint.
